text:
Shape Sender Deluxe heading to Nintendo Switch

According to Dear Villagers and Dead Teapot, Shape Sender Deluxe is heading to Nintendo Switch. A release date will be given later. Shape Sender Deluxe is a physics-based puzzle title. Over 90 handcrafted challenges will be packed in to the final game. If you’re interested in learning more, read up on the following overview: Shape Sender Deluxe is a physics...

text:
Barbarian Saga: The Beastmaster confirms Nintendo Switch release date, new trailer

Today, Barbarian Saga: The Beastmaster secured its release date. We now have confirmation that the game will be ready to go on September 9, 2026. Barbarian Saga: The Beastmaster comes from SelectaPlay and Dormidin Studio. We initially heard about the title back in 2023. Here’s an overview for those that need a refresher: After the brief peace that followed the...

text:
Teeto shares release date and new trailer, will also be on Nintendo Switch 2

Super Rare Games and Eat Pants Games are back with an update for Teeto, as we now have the release date. The game launches on July 15, 2026. It will not only be available on Nintendo Switch as previously announced, but also now Switch 2. Teeto is an upcoming 3D adventure platformer. It was initially announced for Nintendo Switch at...

text:
The Road of Dust and Sorrow announced for Nintendo Switch 2, Switch

Silver Lining Interactive, in partnership with Painted Black Games, today announced The Road of Dust and Sorrow. The game is due out in 2026 on Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch. The Road of Dust and Sorrow is a story-driven pixel art horror game inspired by titles from the 90s. You will experience a world gone wrong as they try to...

text:
Skatesterre, a fast-paced arcade skating game, announced for Nintendo Switch 2

Headup, along with Good Squad, have announced Skatesterre for Nintendo Switch 2. Expect it on the console this summer. Skatesterre is a a fast-paced arcade skating game. Players will be able to “explore diverse levels designed for experimentation and mastery, backed by a high-energy soundtrack featuring underground skate punk and skate rock tracks that channel the attitude of late-90s and...

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Cronos: The New Dawn unveils Lazarus DLC

Bloober Team is making new Lazarus DLC for Cronos: The New Dawn, the company just revealed. Lazarus will have players returning to the wastelands of New Dawn as the once-loyal Pathfinder in the process of transforming into the Warden. You’ll uncover fragments of Warden’s past, teleport, strike, and outrun a relentless hunter. Lots of additional information can be found in...

The post Cronos: The New Dawn unveils Lazarus DLC appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

text:
Vampire Survivors announces Legacy of the Blood Moon DLC

The news for Vampire Survivors keeps rolling in, and today, Legacy of the Blood Moon DLC was announced. Players will be able to pick it up “soon”. The DLC will bring about more than eight characters, over eight weapons plus evolutions, and more. text:

April 27: PowerWash Simulator 2 is gearing up for its next collaboration, which and now Star Wars is getting a brand new DLC pack. text:
BioEden announced for Nintendo Switch 2

BioEden will be appearing on Nintendo Switch 2, Focus Entertainment and Broken Arms Games announced today. We’ll have a release date for you in the future. BioEden is a cozy management game. text:
Defender of the Crown: The Legend Returns confirms Nintendo Switch release date, new trailer

Defender of the Crown: The Legend Returns was previously announced, but Black Tower Basement and Nordcurrent Labs just put out the release date. The title will appear for Nintendo Switch on August 13, 2026. Defender of the Crown: The Legend Returns marks the return of the original game to celebrate its 40th anniversary. It’s been rebuilt from the ground up...
